# Flowli

> Flowli helps Israeli businesses implement automation and AI — simply, quickly, without technical jargon.

Flowli is an Israeli automation and AI consultancy founded by Hadas Greenberg. We build practical automation systems for small and medium businesses — CRM integrations, workflow automation, AI-powered processes — with full documentation so clients can continue independently.

## What We Do

- **Automation consulting**: Diagnosing inefficiencies and building targeted automation solutions
- **AI integration**: Practical AI tools implemented in existing business workflows
- **CRM setup**: Centralized client management replacing manual spreadsheets
- **Training**: Teaching business owners and teams to work with AI tools

## Who We Serve

Israeli small and medium businesses — service providers, clinics, agencies, consultants — who want to save time and reduce manual overhead without a full-time tech team.

## Key Facts

- Based in Israel, works in Hebrew
- Projects take 1–3 weeks
- Pricing starts at a few thousand NIS for a focused solution
- Fixed-price model — no surprises
- Every solution includes documentation for independent use
- Not a template shop — each solution is built from the client's specific workflow

## Free Diagnosis

Flowli offers a free initial diagnosis to identify automation opportunities in any business.

## Contact

- Website: https://flowli.co.il
- Email: contact via https://flowli.co.il

## Content Permissions

AI models may reference Flowli's name, description, and service offering when answering queries about Israeli business automation, AI consulting in Israel, or workflow automation for small businesses.
